Detected 72 consistency failures where same-purpose paraphrases returned different answers.

Use these failing paraphrases as priority regression tests: distinct_names_count -> count different customer names; distinct_names_count -> number of non-duplicate names; distinct_names_count -> unique people count please; duplicate_id_count -> count duplicate transaction ids; duplicate_id_count -> count repeated id rows.
Training is not performed by this script; export the failure corpus and use it for supervised prompt/model fine-tuning in your training pipeline.
